title: Eva 30 vs 333 Anyone Know the Differences
display_title: Eva 30 vs 333 Anyone Know the Differences
wikitext:
[]: Eva 3.0 vs. 3.33 Anyone Know the Differences? Post by Stan » Sat Mar 23, 2013 12:19 am So as with all the rebuilt movies that released on home video, 3.0 will be re-titled 3.33 for the DVD/BD release. The first film 1.0 got released twice, once as 1.01 and the second time as 1.11 with added footage and lots of touch ups to scenes. The second film, 2.0, was released as 2.22 with a whole list of scenes that were improved and/or re-animated. So what about 3.33? The release window between the theatrical version and the Blu ray is extremely short by comparison to 2.22, which is not a bad thing, but leaves me questioning if they even bothered to change anything (and there sure were lots of scenes that needed more detailed animation). So has it been confirmed or stated anywhere whether any improvements/changes were made to this film as the trend suggested in the past years or is it still a mystery? If anyone heard any official news or actual side by side comparisons leak, be sure to post them here

[]: Post by TheDrmcvey » Sat Mar 23, 2013 12:23 am From what I know, there won't be any additional footage added from the original theatrical cut.

[]: Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sat Mar 23, 2013 12:29 am Yeah from what I've heard it's mostly minor animation errors that are going to be fixed. No new scenes or anything.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 23, 2013 2:32 am The Killer of Heroes wrote: minor animation errors

[]: Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sat Mar 23, 2013 7:56 am Uh spoiler alert dude. Now everyone knows Shinji and Kaworu are wearing belts in the movie! :(

[]: Post by robersora » Sat Mar 23, 2013 8:27 am The Killer of Heroes wrote: Uh spoiler alert dude. Now everyone knows Shinji and Kaworu are wearing belts in the movie! :(

[]: Post by Squigsquasher » Sat Mar 23, 2013 2:46 pm robersora wrote: Oh no! Forget it, now you'll never be able to enjoy the movie, with such a major plot point revealed.
